name: Crosswoods Golf Course
about: Crosswoods Golf Course is a 27-hole golf facility located in Crosslake, MN, offering both outdoor play and indoor golf simulator experiences. The course features three different 18-hole layouts carved through native woods with GPS-equipped electric carts and top-notch playing conditions. The venue also houses an indoor golf simulator and games facility, providing year-round golf opportunities. Crosswoods is known for its friendly atmosphere, 10-minute tee time spacing to avoid crowding, and affordable rates ranging from $49-$79 for 18 holes with a cart. The facility includes a clubhouse with dining options, a pro shop, and practice facilities including a driving range and putting green.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium FlightScope launch monitor technology for accurate tracking and club fitting
10-minute tee time spacing providing a relaxed, uncrowded experience
Variety of 27 scenic holes with multiple layout options
Affordable rates compared to other area courses
Indoor simulator available for year-round play

food_and_drink.notes: On-site dining available at Crosswoods Grill with indoor and outdoor seating options overlooking the golf course and waterfall garden
No specific mention of alcohol service on-site

simulator_hardware.notes: New FlightScope Launch Monitor available for use with lessons and club fitting, providing pin point accuracy

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the facility offers a large inventory of clubs available for use, though you're welcome to bring your own equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: On-site dining is available at Crosswoods Grill, but no specific BYOB policy is mentioned for the simulator area.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes on the simulator?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, typical simulator sessions for 18 holes generally range from 1-2 hours depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is the simulator kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior golf programs and clinics for ages 6-12, indicating they accommodate younger golfers in their simulator space.
